name: Chocolate Walnut Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the icing sugar and cocoa.
2. Melt butter in a saucepan.
3. Continue cooking until the butter is hot and bubbly.
4. Remove from heat.
5. Blend the hot butter into the cocoa mixture.
6. Stir in the chopped nuts.
7. Spread the mixture in a greased 8-inch square cake pan.
8. Garnish with walnut halves.
9. Chill until set.
10. Store in refrigerator.
